channel.title: Continual Learning on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Continual Learning on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Transfer Learning (10): Continual Learning
item.description: You can teach yourself to play guitar this year and you will still remember how to ride a bike. A neural network cannot. Fine-tune a vision model on CIFAR-10 then on SVHN, evaluate it on CIFAR-10 again, and accuracy collapses to barely above chance. The phenomenon is called catastrophic forgetting, and overcoming it is the central problem of continual learning (CL): a learner that absorbs a stream of tasks $\mathcal{T}_1, \mathcal{T}_2, \ldots$ without re-accessing past data and without losing what it already knew.
